item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 8s Whether Constitution Hill is declared for his first attempt in Group company on the Flat is
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 8s Whether Constitution Hill is declared for his first attempt in Group company on the Flat is a question that is unlikely to be resolved until Thursday morning, but Newbury clerk of the course George Hill says he is happy with the condition of the track
https:// racingpost.com/news/britain/c onstitution-hill-latest-newbury-aiming-to-start-with-good-ground-on-friday-but-track-expected-to-dry-back-by-saturday-a4NQH7w65rNv/?_sgm_campaign=fcs_acd39d071c000&_sgm_source=N244876%7Cproduct&_sgm_action=search&_sgm_term=newbury&_sgm_pinned=false …

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 22s TODAY's statistics and information for Newmarket ITV races for @AKBets . Ground, weathe
AKBets: AK BETS @AKBets · 13min It’s Not A U-Turn. A Horse Is Not A Dog. Who Does Number 2 Work For. etc. 2 269
item.description: AK BETS @AKBets · 13min It’s Not A U-Turn. A Horse Is Not A Dog. Who Does Number 2 Work For. etc. 2 269

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. BHA are up against it on affordability checks but they can make
item.description: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. BHA are up against it on affordability checks but they can make some quick wins by beefing up their Stewards Reports on the day (and vigorously following up anything missed there) & asking more Qs of some rides. Also, doing more on these private NH (details in pod) & Flat trials Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. Today's @AKBets podcast - Hedge Funds - should now be live on Youtube, Apple and Spotify . 3 1 2 4 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. This is the report we discussed on this morning's @AKBets podc
item.description:
Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. This is the report we discussed on this morning's @AKBets podcast on 43 minutes. Worth a listen. Has the welfare pendulum swung too far away from the human participants in horse racing? Cita Rob Harris @RobHarris · 12 abr. Special report
Deaths of jockeys away from the racecourses raises concerns about whether enough is being done on mental health in horse racing.
I’ve spoken to the mother of a teenage jockey found dead and a jockey who retired young this year
Watch here
https:// youtu.be/2ejYYUKLhqM 4 1 4 5 mil

item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 26min Harry Wilson struck with 100-30 and 7-2 winners on Saturday
Don't miss his tips for da
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 26min Harry Wilson struck with 100-30 and 7-2 winners on Saturday
Don't miss his tips for day two at the Craven meeting De racingpost.com 1 1 1 mil
